headline: Why Fox Corp Stock Sank 24.9% This Week
summary: The media giant is making a large acquisition into the connected TV space.

headline: 'Big Short' Investor Steve Eisman Roasts Fox's $22 Billion Roku Deal: 'Good Luck'
summary: Steve Eisman slams Fox's $22B Roku deal over a steep 57x PE multiple, saying "good luck" as Wall Street reacts with skepticism.
